name: Unified list endpoint
description: Worker `listBudgetsHandler` calls new `listBudgetsForUser(db, { userId, scope?, period? })` returning the union of active household budgets (joined to active `household_memberships`) and personal budgets owned by the current user, sorted by `budget_month DESC`. `?scope=household|personal|all` and `?household_id=...` and `?owner_user_id=...` narrow the result. `household_id` and `owner_user_id` are mutually exclusive.

planned: Integration test asserts unioned list shape with `scope` on every item.
Per-scope filter test asserts `?scope=personal` returns only personal rows.
Extend `apps/worker/test/integration/budgets-create-list.spec.ts` to assert `scope` field on list items.
